summary: AI voice generation and speech synthesis platform.
editor_note: ElevenLabs makes voice cloning feel like magic. Upload 30 seconds of audio, get a voice that sounds real. The ethical implications are enormous and they know it. What is interesting is the business: audiobooks, dubbing, accessibility tools. Not a toy. A platform.
why_featured: Voice AI that actually sounds human
tags: voice ai,speech synthesis,text to speech,artificial intelligence
investors: Andreessen Horowitz, Nat Friedman, Daniel Gross
